subtitle: multi-agent · online
ws_hint: Workspace: the agent operates only inside here
web_hint: Search the web (server-side, available with Claude)
auto_hint: Run actions without asking for confirmation (not recommended)
input_ph: Give a task: create/edit files, compute, search… (⏎ send, ⇧⏎ newline)
hint: Agents run in the browser and call the online models directly: the Cardputer is not loaded. Destructive actions ask for confirmation.
ready_anthropic: 🟣 Multi-agent ready. Give me a task — I can read, write and edit files in the workspace, run sandboxed code, search the web, and open results in the OS. Destructive actions ask for your approval.
ready_generic: ✅ Multi-agent ready. Give me a task — I can read, write and edit files in the workspace, run sandboxed code, and open apps/results in the OS. Destructive actions ask for your approval.
ready_multi_suffix: I automatically use the best model across your providers, with fallback if one is unavailable.
gate_offline_body: The online agents need internet. Reconnect, or use the fully-offline ANIMA assistant instead.
gate_key_body: The multi-agent system needs an online provider API key — Claude, Groq, Grok (xAI) or Gemini. Add one in Settings ▸ AI: one is enough, but if you configure several I use them all with fallback. Without it you can still use the offline ANIMA assistant.
rt_edit_reread: (re-read the file: the "old" string must match exactly)
rt_img_prompt: Specify a prompt for the image.
rt_img_path: Specify a path (where to save the image in the workspace, e.g. img/photo.jpg).
rt_img_no_provider: No image provider configured — an xAI (Grok) key is required. Add it in Settings ▸ AI.
rt_img_no_image: The provider returned no image (it may have returned only a URL: b64 is required).
rt_img_saved: ✔ Image generated and saved to {path} ({kb} KB, {provider}). Open it with open_in_os({path:"{path}"}).
rt_tr_path: Specify a path (audio file in the workspace).
rt_tr_no_provider: No transcription provider configured — a Groq key is required. Add it in Settings ▸ AI.
ao_bad_id_derive: Could not derive a valid id from "{name}".
ao_system_id: id "{id}" already belongs to a system app — pick another.
ao_scaffold_ok:
✔ Scaffold "{name}" ({kind}) created in {id}/ (manifest.json + www/index.html + icon.svg + i18n.en/it.json).
Now EDIT {id}/www/index.html to build the app, then call publish_app({id:"{id}"}).
ao_no_manifest: Missing {id}/manifest.json in staging — use scaffold_app first.
ao_empty_index: {id}/www/index.html is missing or empty — build the app before publishing.
ao_system_exists: A SYSTEM app with id "{id}" already exists: I won't overwrite it. Pick another id.
ao_registry_unreadable: Can't read the system registry (device busy?). NOT installing, to avoid removing the other apps. Try again shortly.
ao_too_large: App too large ({kb} KB > limit {limit} KB) for the device — reduce or split the files.
ao_lint:
App NOT installed — invalid code (fix and republish):
- {errors}
ao_write_registry_fail: Files copied ({copied}) but registry NOT updated: {error} — the app may not appear until you retry.
ao_publish_ok: ✔ App "{name}" installed (id {id}, {copied} files in /apps/{id}/www). It's in the launcher NOW, no reboot. Open it with open_in_os({app:"{id}"}).
ao_manage_system: I can only enable/disable apps created by the agent, not system apps ("{id}").
ao_not_found: No app with id "{id}" in the registry.
ao_registry_unreadable2: Can't read the system registry (device busy?). Try again shortly.
